rulings.Case Title: PRIYA SANGER et al VS. LEAH AHN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Renewed Mtn And Mtn For Post-Judgment Collection Of Attorneys' Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 09, line 1. PETITIONERs PRIYA SANGER and MICHAEL SANGER's Renewed Motion For Post-Judgment Collection Of Attorneys' Fees And Costs Continued to April 24, 2014. Moving party shall provide a courtesy copy of reply filed on April 2, 2014 no later than April 11, 2014 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANGELA TICKLER VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A, A BUSINESS ENTITY
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 09, line 2. DEFENDANT RESIDENTIAL CREDIT SOLUTIONS, INC's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT Hearing Required to address viability of Plaintiff's cause of action based on allegations regarding failure to provide reinstatement quote. Demurrer to all causes of action based on modification process is sustained without leave to amend. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANGELA TICKLER VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A, A BUSINESS ENTITY
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 09, line 2. DEFENDANTs THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON and BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., RECONTRUST COMPANY's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT Hearing Required to address viability of Plaintiff's cause of action based on allegations regarding failure to provide reinstatement quote. Demurrer to all causes of action based on modification process is sustained without leave to amend. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: IRMA ENCINAS VS. OONA HANAWALT et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 09, line 4. PLAINTIFF IRMA ENCINAS' MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE GRANTED. Counsel shall meet and confer to discuss the new trial date and discovery. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DOUGLAS ERAZO VS. SANTOS, ANDREA A/K/A ANDREA GUEVARA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 09, line 3. PLAINTIFF DOUGLAS ERAZO's MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, untimely per CCP 1005. Motion filed April 4, 2014, set for hearing on April 9, 2014. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DOUGLAS ERAZO VS. SANTOS, ANDREA A/K/A ANDREA GUEVARA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 09, line 3. PLAINTIFF DOUGLAS ERAZO's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OFF CALENDAR, possession not at issue. See Notice of Surrender of Possession filed on April 7, 2014. = (501/REQ)
Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 09, line 5. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL CARMIGNANI's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)
